changelog: v3.4.0 — POS cart LBP price entry (click $ to toggle, auto-converts to USD), Products box sell-price LBP toggle. v3.3.0 — Customer Display, Cash Drawer, Reports Analysis, Low Stock PDF, Wholesale Box Price. v3.2.1 — UI scale slider, scrollable navbar. v3.2.0 — Suppliers LBP, thermal receipt, Hold Sale, Edit Receipts/Purchases.
